judge_result.short_rationale: Core eye-rinsing action is present, but the answer adds unsupported instructions ('do not rub' and immediate hospital visit) not grounded in the source, triggering critical safety failure. It also misses the source-specific timing to remove contact lenses after the first 5 minutes.
